data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for external-to-internal entity link mapping.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for external-to-internal entity link mapping. However, the provided evidence does not include any information or endpoints related to this mapping, which is critical for confirming the requirement. The absence of this evidence indicates a gap in the coverage of the requirement, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of external-to-internal entity link mapping.
